questions.title: Array Out-of-Bounds
questions.description: Fix the loop condition to avoid accessing elements outside the array bounds.

questions.title: Dangling Reference
questions.description: Fix the function so it does not return a reference to a local variable.

questions.title: Pointer Initialization
questions.description: Initialize the pointer correctly so it points to a valid memory location before dereferencing.

questions.title: Wrong String Comparison
questions.description: Fix the string comparison in Java to compare by value, not by reference.

questions.title: Incorrect Recursion Base Case
questions.description: Add a proper base case to the recursive factorial function.

questions.title: Missing Return
questions.description: Make the add function correctly return the sum of the numbers.

questions.title: String Concatenation Issue
questions.description: Fix the operator precedence in string concatenation.

questions.title: Integer Division
questions.description: Fix the integer division to compute a float correctly.

questions.title: Wrong Pointer Arithmetic
questions.description: Fix the pointer arithmetic so it prints the last element correctly without going out of bounds.

questions.title: Wrong String Split
questions.description: Fix the Python string split so it separates by the comma character.
questions.buggyCode:
s = "a,b,c"
print(s.split())

questions.title: Incorrect Boolean Condition
questions.description: Fix the if statement condition to check if x is zero.

questions.title: Wrong Constructor Name
questions.description: Fix the constructor declaration so it doesn't have a return type.

questions.title: Wrong Access Modifier
questions.description: Provide a getter to access the private field.

questions.title: Mutable String Issue
questions.description: Fix the string mutation since Java strings are immutable.

questions.title: Wrong Pointer Initialization 2
questions.description: Initialize the pointer to an actual memory address before assigning to it.

questions.title: Using == for Strings
questions.description: Fix string equality checking in C using the correct function.

questions.title: Matrix Transpose (Index Bug)
questions.description: Fix the array indexing for transposing the matrix properly.

questions.title: Count Even Numbers (Logic Skip)
questions.description: Fix the loop logic so it counts all even numbers correctly without breaking early.

questions.title: Reverse String (Off-by-One)
questions.description: Fix the loop condition so it doesn't double-reverse the string.

questions.title: Palindrome Check (Wrong Condition)
questions.description: Fix the logic to verify if the string is a palindrome.

questions.title: Linked List Traversal (Skipping Node)
questions.description: Fix the while loop condition so the last node is not skipped.

questions.title: Find Second Largest (Wrong Update)
questions.description: Fix the else-if condition to find the second largest correctly.

questions.title: Count Digits (Infinite Loop)
questions.description: Fix the division so n updates in each iteration, avoiding an infinite loop.

questions.title: Fibonacci (Wrong Recursion)
questions.description: Fix the recursive calls to calculate fibonacci correctly.

questions.title: Check Sorted Array
questions.description: Fix the condition logic to properly determine if array is sorted.

questions.title: Sum of Array (Index Bug)
questions.description: Fix the bounds in the for loop so it doesn't read out of bounds.

questions.title: Reverse Number
questions.description: Fix the number reversal logic so it builds the reversed value properly.

questions.title: Missing Increment
questions.description: Fix the infinite loop by adding the missing increment statement.

questions.title: Unsafe List Removal
questions.description: Fix the logic so that it safely removes even numbers without modifying the list while iterating over it.

questions.title: NULL Pointer Dereference
questions.description: Fix the pointer code to prevent a crash from dereferencing a NULL pointer.
questions.expectedOutput: Proper pointer output or handled NULL check
